scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n vite,electron -c blue,green "npm run dev -w src-web" "tsc -p electron && wait-on http://localhost:1422 && electron ./electron/dist/main.js"
scripts.build: npm run build -w src-web && tsc -p electron && env-cmd -f .env electron-builder --mac --arm64 --x64
scripts.preview: npm run build -w src-web && tsc -p electron && NODE_ENV=production electron ./electron/dist/main.js
